summary: Public holidays always show your location alongside selected countries in a two-column dashboard row.

introduced: Public holidays use a two-column layout — your location on the left, selected countries on the right
When two countries are selected, the right column rotates between them every eight seconds with manual prev/next controls
changed: Selected countries always appear alongside your location instead of replacing it
Location holidays include state and regional filtering; selected countries show nationwide holidays
Settings copy clarifies that chosen countries appear in the right column next to your location
